selected_gaps.gap: No retrieved frontier leaf makes heterogeneous downstream opportunity costs among currently feasible but unselected assignments learnable when evaluating all alternatives is computationally prohibitive.
selected_gaps.selection_rationale: This is the bottleneck's load-bearing construction gap because without candidate-specific downstream-damage supervision, a learned scheduler cannot distinguish harmless from irreversible feasible deviations at the required action-set scale. architectural_operator_substitution replaces exhaustive per-alternative continuation evaluation with a cheaper surrogate constrained to preserve opportunity-cost ordering, while explicitly avoiding regression to AggreVaTe-style oracle enumeration, Q-learning coverage, or online tree search.

selected_gaps.gap: No retrieved frontier leaf establishes when a bounded amount of alternative-action evidence preserves the ordering of low- versus high-damage scheduling choices as feasible-set size and conflict intensity grow.
selected_gaps.selection_rationale: Under the shared_object thread, this gap stress-tests the same opportunity-cost ordering that the anchor surrogate must learn, rather than introducing a second target. controlled_diagnostic_design varies feasible-set size and conflict intensity while holding schedule state and evidence budget controlled, so rank preservation is measured against tractable exhaustive references rather than confounded by instance difficulty.

selected_gaps.gap: No retrieved paper tests whether the learning signal must be attached only to the single action executed at each partial-schedule state.
selected_gaps.companion_rationale: assumption_audit_and_pivot exposes and overturns the executed-action-only assumption but does not by itself ship the required empirical separation; controlled_diagnostic_design owns the matched-state test of whether multi-action evidence changes downstream scheduling quality.
selected_gaps.selection_rationale: Under the shared_object thread, this gap asks whether the same candidate-level opportunity-cost ordering may supervise multiple feasible actions at one partial schedule instead of only the executed action. assumption_audit_and_pivot directly challenges that load-bearing attachment assumption and pivots to alternative-action evidence, with the companion supplying the empirical diagnostic needed to establish the effect.

deliverable_coverage: method — anchor gap → architectural_operator_substitution yields the runnable bounded-cost surrogate that replaces exhaustive alternative evaluation while preserving candidate opportunity-cost ordering.

architectural_operator_substitution.selection_note: untested lane — differentiation_from_lit must substantively defend the choice

controlled_diagnostic_design.selection_note: untested lane — differentiation_from_lit must substantively defend the choice

assumption_audit_and_pivot.selection_note: untested lane — differentiation_from_lit must substantively defend the choice
